scripts.generate-tailwindcss: git rev-parse --show-toplevel | ( read rootpath; cd $rootpath/_nodejs-order-list-generator && NODE_ENV=development node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i ./tailwind.css -c ./tailwind.config.js -o ./style.css )
scripts.prepare-css: git rev-parse --show-toplevel | ( read rootpath; cd $rootpath/_nodejs-order-list-generator && node prepare-css.js --src ./style.css )
scripts.generate-order-lists: git rev-parse --show-toplevel | ( read rootpath; cd $rootpath/_nodejs-order-list-generator && node generate-order-list.js --src ./style.css --stylelintrc ./.stylelintrc.js --out $rootpath/dist/order_list.json )
scripts.generate: pnpm run generate-tailwindcss && pnpm run prepare-css && pnpm run generate-order-lists
